data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified interface to minimize decision time and enhance user experience.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Button sizes and distances are optimized for swift and easy interactions.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design elements, dynamic adjustability for devices.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focus on key features which provide the most value and engagement to users.
data.technical_spec: User-centered design with a prioritization of popular content.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Employs principles of visual perception to improve interface organization and coherence.
data.technical_spec: Grouping similar content and clear visual hierarchies.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetically pleasing interface which enhances perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Modern and visually appealing design consistent with branding.
